findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GO-2026-4316 in github.com/go-chi/chi/v5@5.2.3
findings.recommendation: Upgrade github.com/go-chi/chi/v5 to a version that resolves GO-2026-4316. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GO-2026-4316 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
